name: Cancel Sales Orders in Bulk
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Steps"}], "data-id": "steps"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Sales Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the checkbox next to each order (within the "}, {"text": "Order ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " column) to be cancelled."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll to the bottom of the page to locate the "}, {"text": "Bulk Actions", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Cancelled", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the "}, {"text": "Change Order Status", "bold": true}, {"text": " dropdown."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Apply ", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. Neto will display a dialog box, asking you to confirm the cancellation."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "OK", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Result"}], "data-id": "result"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The selected orders will now be cancelled, and the items will be returned to stock."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
